1.q: Elevation of IAA led to enhanced root development... the C-terminal AFVY tetrapeptide efficiently sorted T. maritima BglB into the vacuole... leading to elevated hormone [abscisic acid (ABA), indole 3-acetic acid (IAA), and cytokinin] levels

2.q: The elevation of cytokinin led to upregulation of the transcription factor WUSCHELL... leading to elevated hormone [ABA, IAA, and cytokinin] levels that likely contributed to the phenotypic changes in the transgenic plants.
